approach.title: Our Approach
content: Our mission is to create safe, nurturing spaces of learning and support for street-connected children, particularly child waste pickers and child laborers. This vision is brought to life through our Community Learning Centers, fondly known as Anandghar (A Home of Happiness).

These centers serve as a vital bridge between children, their families, schools, and society. They provide both formal and informal education, along with essential life skills, to children from marginalized and economically disadvantaged backgrounds. Our goal is to prepare them to join mainstream schools, thrive academically, and build a future of dignity and opportunity.
